name: Winding–Parity Estimator and Flip-Rate Order Parameter
equation: w_k = round((theta_R,k - theta_R,0)/(2*pi));  b_k = (-1)^(w_k);  r_b = #{k: b_k != b_k-1}/(K-1)
description: Streaming topological summary: integer winding w_k induces parity b_k, whose flip-rate r_b acts as a locking/unlocking order parameter.
source: RDM3DC / PR Root Guide (Phase-Lift + Adaptive-π + ARP/AIN thread)
evidence: r_b rises with noise or insufficient adaptive bound
